use_codes.desc: PROPHYLAXIS TO PREVENT ATTACKS OF HEREDITARY ANGIOEDEMA (HAE) IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER
PROPHYLAXIS TO PREVENT ATTACKS OF HEREDITARY ANGIOEDEMA (HAE) IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
ORLADEYO® is indicated for prophylaxis to prevent attacks of hereditary angioedema (HAE) in adults
and pediatric patients 2 years of age and older.
Limitations of Use:
The safety and effectiveness of ORLADEYO for the treatment of acute HAE attacks have not been
established. ORLADEYO should not be us...
